name: ClawPipe
tagline: The only AI gateway that skips LLM calls entirely.
description: SDK-local LLM optimization pipeline (Booster -> Pack -> Cache -> Route -> Call -> Learn) plus multi-provider gateway. Public measured benchmark in progress at https://github.com/finsavvyai/clawpipe-booster-benchmark; pre-registered methodology v1.0 locked 2026-05-18.

capabilities.summary: 246 deterministic rules across 29 packs (math, regex, JWT, ISO, dates, JSON) skip the LLM at <1 ms.
capabilities.evidence: Skip rate per workload bucket pending public measured benchmark (in progress).
Per-bucket savings pending public measured benchmark.

capabilities.summary: Hash + Cloudflare Workers AI BGE-small embedding semantic cache with TTL + LRU eviction.
capabilities.evidence: Per-bucket hit rate pending public measured benchmark.

capabilities.summary: Cost/quality/latency-aware model selection with self-learning weights and recursive fallback.
capabilities.evidence: Routing distribution pending public measured benchmark.

capabilities.summary: Multi-provider dispatch with circuit breaker and fair-share rate limiting.
capabilities.evidence: 21 providers including Bedrock (SigV4) and Vertex (RS256 JWT).

capabilities.summary: Tracks outcomes; refines weights; optional LLM-as-judge quality scoring.
capabilities.evidence: scoreResponse() default judge gpt-4o-mini, 10s timeout, 0.5 safe fallback.

endpoints.summary: Send a prompt through the pipeline. Honors `Idempotency-Key` header.
Manually replay a parked webhook delivery.
Public anonymized aggregate stats across all projects.

priorSyntheticRun.note: Prior in-house synthetic run on 200 unique prompts (2 passes, mocked gateway). Preserved for transparency; superseded by the measured run when it lands.
